channel.title: NAM Daval, A Corré, C Palpacuer, J Housset, G Poillon, M Eliezer, B Verillaud, D Slama, D Ayache, P Herman, C Jourdaine, C Hervé, W El Bakkouri, D Salmon, C Hautefort | PlatCOVID

item.title: Efficacy of local budesonide therapy in the management of persistent hyposmia in COVID-19 patients without signs of severity: A structured summary of a study protocol for a randomised controlled trial.
